user.title: Configure Petkit Feeder
user.description: Please enter your Petkit account information

device.title: Select Device
device.description: Found {device_count} feeder devices, please select the device to add

add_feeding_item.name: Add Feeding Item
add_feeding_item.description: Add a new feeding schedule item

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional, specify the config entry ID to operate on

day.name: Day
day.description: Day of the week for the feeding schedule (1=Monday, 7=Sunday)

amount.description: Amount of food in grams per feeding (1-100g)

name.description: Name of the feeding schedule (e.g., Breakfast)

entry_id.description: Optional, specify the config entry ID to operate on

day.name: Day
day.description: Day of the week for the feeding schedule (1=Monday, 7=Sunday)

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: ID of the feeding schedule item to remove

toggle_feeding_item.name: Toggle Feeding Item
toggle_feeding_item.description: Enable or disable a feeding schedule item

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional, specify the config entry ID to operate on

day.name: Day
day.description: Day of the week for the feeding schedule (1=Monday, 7=Sunday)

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: ID of the feeding schedule item to toggle

update_feeding_item.name: Update Feeding Item
update_feeding_item.description: Update properties of a feeding schedule item

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional, specify the config entry ID to operate on

day.name: Day
day.description: Day of the week for the feeding schedule (1=Monday, 7=Sunday)

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: ID of the feeding schedule item to update

time.name: Time

amount.description: New amount of food in grams (1-100g)
